title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at GE Healthcare India

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at GE Healthcare India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Medical Officer looking for your next big career move? GE Healthcare India in Vadodara offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About GE Healthcare India:
GE Healthcare India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with GE Healthcare India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
